title: parodia claviceps
intro: Parodia claviceps, also known as the "Devil's Claw", is a flowering plant native to southern Africa, belonging to the sesame family. The medicinal properties of Parodia claviceps lie in its roots, which have been used for centuries to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, making it a popular remedy for arthritis, back pain, and other musculoskeletal problems. Parodia claviceps can be prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
